picks.reasoning: Boston (52-25, L10: 8-2, NetRtg +8.1, L15: +34.2) vs Toronto (43-34, L10: 5-5, NetRtg +2.2, L15: +25.2). NetRtg gap: +5.9 points (season), L15 gap: +9.0 — well above the 4.0 threshold for meaningful signal. Boston is home at TD Garden. Toronto missing Immanuel Quickley (franchise player, OUT confirmed via NBA official PDF) and Chucky Hepburn (OUT). Quickley is Toronto's primary playmaker — his absence significantly degrades their offensive ceiling. Boston missing Vucevic (Questionable per NBA PDF — not confirmed out, treat as potentially active; minor impact even if out). Boston -10 spread: home court +2-3 pts, franchise player gap heavily favours BOS, L15 dominance is clear. DefRtg: BOS 112.7 vs TOR 113.4 — roughly comparable, but BOS OffRtg 120.7 vs TOR DefRtg 113.4 = strong offensive edge. Spread confidence floor is 60; I'm at 72. B2B check: no B2B issues noted for either team. Seeding motivation: BOS at 52-25 still in top-4 East race — motivation positive. EV = (0.72 × 1.92) - 1 = 1.3824 - 1 = 0.3824. Strong EV well above 0.15 threshold. Odds 1.92 within spread target range 1.80-2.30. Line anomaly check: BOS favoured at home with better record — no anomaly. Stake: confidence 72 = High tier (20-25%), using 15% given spread market caution = €150.

picks.match: Houston Rockets vs Golden State Warriors
picks.reasoning: Houston (48-29, L10: 7-3, NetRtg +5.1, L15: +46.1) at Golden State (36-41, L10: 4-6, NetRtg -0.3, L15: -20.5). L15 gap: +66.6 — massive directional signal favouring HOU. NetRtg gap: +5.4 points. HOU on W5 streak. GSW confirmed tank-watch (36-41, L3 losing streak, NetRtg -0.3). GSW missing: Jimmy Butler III (OUT - ACL surgery), Al Horford (OUT). Stephen Curry and Seth Curry both Questionable — if Steph sits, GSW loses their only remaining star. HOU missing: Steven Adams (OUT) and Fred VanVleet (OUT) — these are key contributors but not singular franchise anchors; Alperen Sengun/Amen Thompson lead. ML odds 2.50 exactly at ceiling of target range. Line anomaly check: HOU (48-29) as away underdog at 2.50 vs GSW (36-41) — HOU has materially better record priced as underdog. This triggers the 'Home team with materially better record priced as underdog at ≥ 2.20' anomaly check — HOWEVER, HOU is the AWAY team here, so the rule doesn't directly apply (rule references home team as underdog). HOU as away underdog at 2.50 despite far superior record and form is a value opportunity, not a line anomaly per the rules. EV = (0.62 × 2.50) - 1 = 1.55 - 1 = 0.55. Strong EV. Confidence floor for ML is 50; I'm at 62. Seeding: HOU at 48-29 still in playoff race for top-4 West — motivation very high. GSW has nothing to play for at 36-41. Stake: confidence 62 = Medium tier (15-20%), using 10% = €100 (modest given away game and Steph Curry GTD uncertainty which adds risk).

PHX ML 1.22 outside range; CHI ML 4.40 outside range (no edge justifying it). CHI L10: 2-8, PHX L10: 3-7 — both cold teams. CHI L15: -53.7 catastrophic. PHX L15: +14.2 positive but PHX ML 1.22 not bettable. Spread: CHI +10.0 at 1.94 — CHI is terrible (L15: -53.7, NetRtg -5.3) but PHX also cold (L10 3-7, L2 skid). PHX covering -10 vs a team in their building is uncertain; PHX trend negative. No strong edge. Reject.

MIL missing Giannis Antetokounmpo (OUT - franchise player). Without Giannis, MIL (30-47, L10: 2-8) is a tank-tier team. MEM ML 2.88 is in range but MEM (25-52, L10: 2-8, L15: -48.9) is also confirmed tank-tier with multiple key absences. MIL L15: -43.2, MEM L15: -48.9 — negligible gap. No franchise player on either side. Tanker vs tanker with no edge. Reject.

LINE ANOMALY: CLE ML 1.08, spread -16.0. CLE missing both franchise bigs (Jarrett Allen OUT, Evan Mobley OUT — confirmed NBA PDF). Indiana also severely depleted (Haliburton OUT, Nembhard OUT, McConnell OUT, Nesmith OUT). CLE ML 1.08 far outside range. Spread -16 is anomaly-tier given CLE's dual franchise absence. IND ML 8.0 is out of range. No bettable line exists. Anomaly flagged: CLE priced at -16 despite losing both All-Star calibre bigs; IND also gutted. Deferred — monitor for line correction before tip.

MIN ML 1.78 is in range (below 1.80 by 0.02 — borderline miss). Spread: MIN -2.0 at 1.91 in range. Anthony Edwards Questionable for MIN (franchise player — GTD penalty: confidence -10, stake -20%). Jaden McDaniels also OUT. CHA (42-36, L10: 8-2, NetRtg +5.3, L15: +44.0) is surging with play-in motivation. MIN L15: -4.0 vs CHA L15: +44.0 — L15 gap strongly favours CHA (+48). MIN ML 1.78 is below the 1.80 floor. CHA ML 2.06 is in range — evaluating CHA ML: CHA is away at Target Center, MIN is home. Home court negates some edge. With Edwards GTD, the L15 gap (+48 to CHA) is significant but Edwards' potential return matters. CHA ML 2.06: EV = (0.62 × 2.06) - 1 = 0.277. Confidence estimated at ~60 base for CHA — they have road game (-2-3 pts), Edwards GTD creates uncertainty. If Edwards plays, MIN wins easily. If Edwards sits, CHA has real shot. Rule: Questionable player ~50% chance of playing — cannot build thesis on absence. Confidence drops below usable threshold with Edwards GTD risk. No pick.

picks.match: Houston Rockets vs Golden State Warriors
picks.reasoning: Houston L15 NetRtg: +46.1 (elite recent form) vs Golden State L15: -20.5 — massive gap of +66.6 in L15 differential. Season NetRtg: Houston +5.1 vs GSW -0.3 — 5.4 point gap. Houston 48-29 (L10: 7-3, streak: W5) vs GSW 36-41 (L10: 4-6, streak: L3). GSW confirmed tank-watch per skills. Stephen Curry Questionable (Pain Syndrome) and Seth Curry Questionable — if Steph sits, GSW are severely depleted. Jimmy Butler III OUT. Houston missing VanVleet and Adams (confirmed via NBA official) but core remains strong. Houston road game (away), so apply -5 confidence for away factor but no B2B. Base confidence: 68. Away adjustment: -5 → adjusted to 63. Still above ML floor of 50. EV = (0.63 × 2.35) - 1 = 1.4805 - 1 = 0.4805 — STRONG edge. Odds 2.35 within ML target range 1.70–2.50. Steph Curry questionable status is a risk — if he plays, reduce edge. GSW tank-watch + L3 losing streak + Houston W5 streak + massive L15 gap all align. Confidence 63 post-adjustment, stake: Medium tier (55-69) = 15-20% = €150.
